scripts.format: bun run web:format && bun run api:format && bun run db:format
scripts.landing:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages/landing && cd packages/landing && gleam format && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/gleam_format.ts
scripts.api:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages/api && cd packages/api && gleam format && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/gleam_format.ts
